description: Stakeholders continuously add new requirements after the design phase, causing delays and budget overruns.
mitigation: Implement a formal change control board and freeze requirements after milestone reviews.

description: Dependence on a single supplier for critical components limits flexibility and increases cost risk.
mitigation: Qualify at least two alternative vendors for each critical component.

description: Subsystems developed by different teams fail to interface correctly during system integration testing.
mitigation: Define interface control documents early and conduct incremental integration tests.

description: Project costs exceed the approved budget due to underestimated complexity or scope changes.
mitigation: Use parametric cost estimation models and maintain a 15% management reserve.

description: Milestones are missed due to resource constraints or unforeseen technical challenges.
mitigation: Build schedule buffers at critical path junctions and track earned value metrics.

description: A vulnerability in the system architecture is exploited, compromising data integrity or availability.
mitigation: Conduct threat modeling during design and perform regular penetration testing.

description: Key engineers leave the project, resulting in knowledge loss and ramp-up time for replacements.
mitigation: Maintain up-to-date documentation and cross-train team members on critical subsystems.

description: The delivered system does not meet evolving government or industry standards.
mitigation: Assign a compliance officer to track regulatory changes and incorporate them into requirements.

description: The hardware-in-the-loop test environment is unavailable when needed, delaying verification.
mitigation: Reserve test environment slots early and develop a simulation-based backup test plan.

description: Distributed teams across time zones have misaligned expectations due to poor communication.
mitigation: Hold weekly cross-team sync meetings and use a shared project dashboard for status updates.

description: A key technology becomes obsolete before the system is fielded, requiring redesign.
mitigation: Select components with long-term vendor support commitments and plan technology refresh cycles.

description: Critical project or operational data is lost due to hardware failure or human error.
mitigation: Implement automated daily backups with offsite redundancy and periodic restore tests.
